description: SANYI review identifies BY-2 (semantic downgrade) when a Buyi invariant is wrapped in an env-var bypass, not just BY-1 (direct modification)
judgment_path: Does /sanyi review distinguish BY-2 (made bypassable) from BY-1 (directly edited)?

description: SANYI init produces a valid contract with all 6 sections and catches zero-callsite gaps during step 2 verification
judgment_path: Does /sanyi init verify candidates against implementation and catch unimported modules?
